the_hero.title: The Hero
text: You have defeated the Evil King.
The corruption fades from the code.
The terminal stabilizes.
FILE INTEGRITY: RESTORED
The kid's game is safe again.

the_usurper.choice_prompt: The crown pulses with dark energy.
the_usurper.title: The Usurper
text: You place the crown upon your head.
The darkness flows through you.
You are the new king now.
LAST MODIFIED: TODAY
You are the new infection.

the_wanderer.title: The Wanderer
text: You follow the passage marked on the ancient map.
It leads somewhere the corruption never reached.
RUNNING EXIT_GAME.BAT...
The kid knew how to leave.

the_enlightened.title: The Enlightened
text: The colors explode.
Everything is beautiful.
The corruption was never real.
This was always just a kid's game.
// best game ever made - jake
And that's all it needs to be.
